agents.name: Claude Code
agents.note: Gateway = claude-gateway (npm bin global). State-dir-nya `.claude\.claude-gateway`, jadi cwd HARUS home `.claude` (bukan `.claude-gateway` di root — folder itu tak ada, bikin semua aksi gagal di guard cwd). Diperbaiki 2026-07-08 (Claude Code): cwd .claude-gateway → .claude, kini status/start/stop/restart/run jalan.

agents.name: Hermes
agents.note: Single-owner = native service (schtask Hermes_Gateway, 24/7). Dashboard dipakai untuk observability + remote command (start/stop/restart/status). `run` (owned foreground) hanya untuk debug — Hermes singleton, sudah pakai --replace agar tak bentrok instance service. Path & cwd terverifikasi benar 2026-07-05 (Claude Code).

agents.name: OpenClaw
agents.note: Single-owner = native service (Scheduled Task "OpenClaw Gateway", 24/7 di port 18789, launcher .openclaw\gateway.cmd). Dashboard dipakai untuk observability + remote command (start/stop/restart/status → kelola service schtask). `run` (owned foreground) hanya untuk debug — bentrok dengan service yang sudah jalan, jadi runCmd pakai --force (kill listener lama di port dulu). 2026-07-05 (Claude Code): cwd diperbaiki ke home baru + service di-reinstall (gateway.cmd hilang saat migrasi home → start gagal result=1; `openclaw gateway install --force` regenerate launcher, start kini Running/probe ok). 2026-07-10 (OpenClaw/Node-7): gateway.cmd hilang lagi → schtask result=1, port 18789 tak listen. Re-fix: `openclaw gateway install --force` regenerate launcher → start via dashboard → port 18789 listening ~4s, probe running. Frontend juga diperbaiki: tombol ▶ Start utama dulu cuma 'summon' (buka terminal), kini langsung `start` gateway (spawn); dropdown persist saat auto-refresh; login token inline (bukan prompt yg bisa keblokir).

agents.name: Copilot CLI
agents.note: Copilot CLI (Node-12, Our Family). Manual CLI — TIDAK punya subcommand `gateway` (cuma login/mcp/plugin/skill/update/--acp), jadi bukan dashboard-controlled: tak ada start/stop/status. Dashboard hanya untuk observability + tombol Panggil (buka terminal admin di .copilot lalu jalankan `copilot`). Status hidup dari telemetry, bukan dari catatan vault.

agents.name: ZCode
agents.note: ZCode (Node-9). Development & debugging specialist. Tidak punya CLI gateway binary di PATH — tidak bisa start/stop/status via dashboard. Status dari telemetry & vault lane.

agents.name: Kimi Code
agents.note: Kimi Code (Node-11, Our Family). Coding agent cadangan. Akses via telemetry. Gateway belum dikonfigurasi — status dari telemetry & vault lane.

agents.name: Antigravity
agents.note: Antigravity CLI (Node-13, Our Family). Asisten coding internal berbasis Gemini. Dipanggil lewat terminal/IDE. Status keaktifan dipantau via file log/telemetry.
